name: rad-context-prompter
description: Reverse-engineer and migrate AI prompts. The prompt-decompiler skill routes between six modes — anatomize, translate, compress, decompose, forensics, diagnose — on prompts you paste in. The prompt-engineering skill covers writing patterns and platform-specific shape (Claude, GPT, Gemini, image generators, agentic tools). Plus an autonomous prompt-debugger agent for prompt-output failure analysis.
